---
title: "\'Church of the Holy Trinity, Winchester\' by C. M. Y. [No. 11 in the Cathedral Sketches series]"
---

## \'Church of the Holy Trinity, Winchester\' by C. M. Y. [No. 11 in the Cathedral Sketches series]

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1857
**Genre:** Non-fiction, history
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** MP (March 1857) 303-18

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
